title: DocumentTabs component with keyboard navigation and draft indicators
purpose: Provides tab navigation for different document types with visual indicators for draft changes and keyboard accessibility support.
module_context: Defines tab configurations with icons and implements a component that renders tabs with draft status indicators and keyboard navigation.

steps.content: Determine the draft status for the specified tab based on the corresponding prop value.
Return the draft status for conceptual tab if the tab ID matches.
Return the draft status for technical tab if the tab ID matches.
Return the draft status for files tab if the tab ID matches.
Return the draft status for related tab if the tab ID matches.
Return the draft status for diagrams tab if the tab ID matches.
Return false if the tab ID does not match any known tab.
Extract active tab, tab change handler, and class name from the component props.
Define a keyboard event handler that navigates between tabs using arrow keys.
Render a container element with tablist role and appropriate styling.
Map over the tab configurations to render individual tab buttons.
For each tab, determine if it is the active tab and if it has a draft.
Render a button for each tab with appropriate styling and accessibility attributes.
Include the tab icon and label in the button content.
Display a draft indicator badge when the tab has draft changes.
Find the index of the current tab in the tab configuration array.
Calculate the next tab index when the right arrow key is pressed.
Calculate the previous tab index when the left arrow key is pressed.
Prevent the default behavior of the keyboard event when navigation occurs.
Trigger the tab change handler with the next tab's ID.
